# Pathology Report

## Basic Information
- **Pathology Number**: 2026-02001
- **Patient Name**: Jane Doe
- **Gender**: Female
- **Age**: 58 years
- **Submitting Department**: Breast Surgery
- **Submission Date**: February 15, 2026
- **Report Date**: February 20, 2026

## Specimen Information
- **Specimen Type**: Right modified radical mastectomy specimen
- **Specimen Size**: 20cm×15cm×5cm
- **Tumor Location**: Right breast, upper outer quadrant
- **Tumor Size**: 3.5cm×2.5cm×2.0cm
- **Margin Status**: Superior, inferior, medial, lateral, and basal margins all free of carcinoma

## Histological Examination

### Gross Examination
- **Tumor Morphology**: Irregular shape, hard consistency, ill-defined borders
- **Cut Surface Characteristics**: Gray-white, fish-fleshed appearance, with necrosis
- **Surrounding Tissue**: Fat tissue shows carcinoma infiltration

### Microscopic Examination
- **Histological Type**: Invasive ductal carcinoma, no special type
- **Histological Grade**: Grade II (Bloom-Richardson grading)
- **Mitotic Count**: 10 mitoses/10HPF
- **Necrosis**: Focal necrosis present
- **Vascular Invasion**: Lymphatic invasion present, no vascular invasion
- **Nerve Invasion**: No nerve invasion

## Immunohistochemical Examination

### Routine Immunohistochemistry
- **ER**: (+, 90%)
- **PR**: (+, 70%)
- **HER2**: (2+)
- **Ki-67**: (+, 30%)
- **E-cadherin**: (+)
- **P120**: (membrane+)
- **CK5/6**: (-)
- **EGFR**: (-)

### FISH Test
- **HER2 Gene Amplification**: Positive (HER2/CEP17 ratio=3.2)

## Molecular Testing

### Genetic Testing
- **BRCA1**: Wild type
- **BRCA2**: Wild type
- **PIK3CA**: E545K mutation
- **TP53**: R273H mutation
- **ERBB2**: No mutation

## Lymph Node Examination
- **Axillary Lymph Nodes**: 20 nodes, 3 with metastatic carcinoma
- **Sentinel Lymph Nodes**: 2 nodes, 1 with metastatic carcinoma
- **Internal Mammary Lymph Nodes**: 0 nodes, no metastatic carcinoma

## TNM Staging
- **T Stage**: T2 (tumor greatest dimension >2cm and ≤5cm)
- **N Stage**: N1 (1-3 axillary lymph nodes with metastasis)
- **M Stage**: M0 (no distant metastasis)
- **Pathological Stage**: pT2N1M0, Stage IIB

## Other Examinations
- **Intravascular Tumor Thrombus**: Positive
- **Perineural Invasion**: Negative
- **Skin Invasion**: Negative
- **Pectoral Fascia Invasion**: Negative

## Pathological Diagnosis
Right breast invasive ductal carcinoma, no special type, Grade II, pT2N1M0, Stage IIB. Immunohistochemistry: ER (+, 90%), PR (+, 70%), HER2 (2+, FISH positive), Ki-67 (+, 30%). Molecular testing: PIK3CA E545K mutation, TP53 R273H mutation, BRCA1/2 wild type. Axillary lymph node metastasis (3/20), sentinel lymph node metastasis (1/2).

## Notes
1. Suggest comprehensive judgment combined with clinical and other examination results
2. Suggest HER2-targeted therapy
3. Suggest endocrine therapy
4. Suggest regular follow-up
